series_metadata.series_title: Bureau of Labor Statistics Monthly History File
series_metadata.series_description: Employer history file listing the number of employees by gender, production and non-supervisory status, payroll, regular and overtime hours.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
